content_workflow_gates.purpose: Every slide must bind at least one product capability id before native PPT drawing.
pass_fail_checks: pass only when the slide references capability ids from run2_57_product_capability_memory.json
fail when a slide only states generic design improvement
fail when required product terms are fewer than the slide contract minimum

content_workflow_gates.purpose: Every slide must answer its assigned reader question from run2_57_slide_message_contracts.json.
pass_fail_checks: pass only when the visible slide content answers the reader question in concrete product terms
fail when the slide has more visual panels than product explanation
fail when the slide could fit any generic AI design product
content_workflow_gates.bad_control_probe: bad_run2_56_without_product_capability_content may reuse Run 2.56 visual roles but must fail reader-question answer status.

content_workflow_gates.purpose: The deck must explain that Vulca's primary output is code-generated editable PPT, with image generation limited to optional backgrounds or illustrations.
pass_fail_checks: pass only when the slide uses code-generated editable PPT wording where output is discussed
fail when the slide implies the main output is image generation
fail when native editability, trace, or QA are omitted from the product output explanation
content_workflow_gates.bad_control_probe: bad_run2_56_without_product_capability_content must not claim code-generated editable PPT unless the content contract is bound.

content_workflow_gates.purpose: The product value must be explained against prompt-only, image generator, template slide tool, design editor, and office copilot alternatives.
pass_fail_checks: pass only when contrast or proof slides bind at least three competitor boundary ids
fail when comparison is only visual taste or color preference
fail when no bad-control boundary is visible in trace
content_workflow_gates.bad_control_probe: bad_run2_56_without_product_capability_content may compare visually but must not bind competitor boundary ids.

content_workflow_gates.purpose: Generic claims like evidence becomes design or better aesthetics from data must be counted and rejected before rendering.
pass_fail_checks: pass only when generic claim count is zero on full-arm slides
fail when an empty claim appears without product mechanism, output, comparison, or verification detail
fail when more words are added without more product-specific content units
content_workflow_gates.bad_control_probe: bad_run2_56_without_product_capability_content should expose generic claim count above zero.

content_workflow_gates.purpose: The close slide must explain that Run 2.57 creates no deck and Run 2.58 is the next generated proof.
pass_fail_checks: pass only when the deck states that Run 2.57 is data/workflow-only
pass only when Run 2.58 is named as the next generated proof
fail when the deck claims public-ready output without human review and source-boundary approval

next_generated_run_contract.blocked_claim: Do not claim public-ready output until Run 2.58 consumes this layer and passes visual human review, native render inspection, source-boundary review, and release approval.
